feed.title: Google Cloud: Memorystore for Redis
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Memorystore for Redis

entry.content: The Memorystore for Redis remote MCP server is Generally Available.
entry.summary: The Memorystore for Redis remote MCP server has reached General Availability. This feature allows for enhanced management and access to your Redis instances.
entry.title: Feature: Memorystore for Redis remote MCP server is now GA

entry.content: You can use the Memorystore for Redis remote MCP server. This server lets you connect to Memorystore for Redis instances from LLMs, AI applications, and AI-enabled development platforms. This feature is available in Preview.
entry.summary: A new remote MCP server allows you to connect your LLMs, AI applications, and AI-enabled development platforms to Memorystore for Redis instances. This feature is currently in Preview.
entry.title: Feature: Connect LLMs to Memorystore for Redis

entry.content: You can deploy instances in the asia-southeast3 (Bangkok) region.
entry.summary: Memorystore for Redis is now available in the asia-southeast3 (Bangkok) region. This expansion provides users in Southeast Asia with lower latency and improved performance for their applications.
entry.title: Feature: New region available for Memorystore for Redis

entry.summary: A security fix has been implemented for Memorystore Redis to address CVE-2025-49844.
entry.title: Feature: Security fix for Memorystore Redis

entry.content: You can now use Cloud Logging to query and view maintenance logs for a Memorystore for Redis instance. For more information, see View maintenance logs. This feature is Generally Available.
entry.summary: View maintenance logs for your Memorystore for Redis instances using Cloud Logging.
entry.title: Feature: Cloud Logging for Memorystore for Redis Maintenance Logs
